mission.title: k3s: preload a docker image on the k3s node agents
mission.description:
This PR adds preloading existing container images ( `docker save` format ) from `/var/lib/rancher/k3s/agent/images`

Fixes #92

resolution.summary: Confirmed that this version is working for my use case in #92
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
$ sudo k3s crictl images
IMAGE                                      TAG                 IMAGE ID            SIZE
docker.io/library/myimage                  latest              652014e0a66b3       82MB
